array.string: bash scripts/backup_db.sh && uv run python scripts/ingest_sleeper.py --season 2026 && uv run python scripts/ingest_fantasypros.py --daily && uv run python scripts/score_sleeper_projections.py && uv run python scripts/build_valuation.py && uv run python scripts/ingest_fp_news.py --daily && uv run python scripts/morning_briefing.py
